chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Next element is my hr tag

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: which is a horizontal rule element

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Horizontal rule element brings breaks in my page

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: If I have written many lines

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: For example, I have written paragraph

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: This is my name which is Shraddha

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: I have written many texts like this

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: and I want a line to come in between

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: which divides my page into this part and this part

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: To bring breaks in the page, I use hr tag

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: In hr tag, opening and closing tags are not different

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: There is only a single tag

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Like this, I have written an angular bracket

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: hr and closing bracket

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: This tag is very similar to my br tag

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: br tag used to give me line break

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: whereas hr tag is like a divider for me

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: To learn this, I am going to write some paragraphs in my html document

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: For example, I have written one paragraph

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: This is my name which is Shraddha Thapra

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's make another paragraph

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: I am your web development teacher

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's make another tag

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: I teach you on Apna College

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's write another paragraph

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: I love coding

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's save this and what I am going to do is

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's refresh this page once

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: So, I have got all the paragraphs

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: After the second paragraph, I am going to write my hr tag

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's save and run again

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: So, this horizontal line is on the screen

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: This means a divider on the page

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: or a horizontal line

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: or a horizontal line

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: We can use this line to divide our page into different sections

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: We are going to do one thing

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: The content we had written for the portfolio page

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: We are going to copy this into a separate file

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: portfolio.html

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: We are going to use our hr tag in this

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: I have copied and pasted my code

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's save this

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Now, my page looks like this

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: This is my portfolio page

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: I can't see the image

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: because the image is in a separate folder

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: I am going to transfer my image in my web classroom folder

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's refresh this again

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: and paste it in the same folder

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's save this

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's run again

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: This was my portfolio page

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Now, I want my this much part

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: to be in a separate section

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: My education section, skill section, hobby section, contact section should be separate

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: I am going to add a horizontal line break in between all these

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: My this much part

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: where my heading and photo is included

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: I am going to add hr tag here

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's save this

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: You can see

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: that the closing and opening tags are in the same place

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: By default, my VS code is

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: adding a slash for me

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: But even if I don't add a slash, my code will work

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: We are going to copy this same thing

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: after our education section

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Same thing after my skill section

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: and my hobby section

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: Let's save and refresh this

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: So, in this way, my whole page

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: is divided into different sections

chunks.title: Hr Tag
chunks.text: So, in this way, we use our hr tag
